content: Christopher Nolan's Odyssey hasn't had the best week, with the latest trailer getting ratioed into oblivion. And I think I know why. Let's find out...

chineseContent: 克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》本周表现不佳，最新的预告片被遗忘。我想我知道为什么。让我们来了解一下...
